fields.calculatedFormula:
IMAGE( 
CASE( urgency__c , 
"業務は停止しない", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif",
"回避策のある業務停止", "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif",
"重大な業務停止", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", 
"/s.gif"), 
"Urgency Flag")
fields.label: 緊急度フラグ
fields.name: urgencyFlag__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IMAGE( 
CASE( importance__c , 
"目立った影響はない", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif",
"事業運営に影響がある", "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif",
"組織の利益に重大な影響がある", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", 
"/s.gif"), 
"importance Flag")
fields.label: 重要度フラグ
fields.name: importanceFlag__c
